raw_response:
I agree with the summary of postural position not affecting occlusal adjustments as it pertains more broadly to posture and skeletal positioning rather than direct mechanical aspects like compensation curves, cuspal relationships, and incisal guidance which do impact how teeth meet during mastication and other functions. Answer Choice: D.
